test-case.description: loads config/config.psd1 when present
test-case.name: Get-ArmConfig.loads config/config.psd1 when present

test-case.description: falls back to config.example.psd1 when config.psd1 missing
test-case.name: Get-ArmConfig.falls back to config.example.psd1 when config.psd1 missing

test-case.description: validates required keys in config
test-case.name: Get-ArmConfig.validates required keys in config

test-case.description: does not throw when required paths missing but Simulate is true
test-case.name: Get-ArmConfig.does not throw when required paths missing but Simulate is true

test-case.description: expands relative paths to absolute
test-case.name: Get-ArmConfig.expands relative paths to absolute

test-case.description: writes to console and logs file
test-case.name: Write-ArmLog.writes to console and logs file

test-case.description: creates log file in LogDir
test-case.name: Write-ArmLog.creates log file in LogDir

test-case.description: never throws when LogDir is inaccessible
test-case.name: Write-ArmLog.never throws when LogDir is inaccessible

test-case.description: appends to existing log file
test-case.name: Write-ArmLog.appends to existing log file

test-case.description: includes timestamp and log level
test-case.name: Write-ArmLog.includes timestamp and log level

test-case.description: returns object with correct properties
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.returns object with correct properties

test-case.description: validates tool names
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.validates tool names

test-case.description: handles instant-exit stubs without race condition (regression)
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.handles instant-exit stubs without race condition (regression)

test-case.description: locates stub scripts in Simulate mode
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.locates stub scripts in Simulate mode

test-case.description: handles missing tool gracefully in real mode
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.handles missing tool gracefully in real mode

test-case.description: returns structured output object
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.returns structured output object

test-case.description: properly quotes arguments containing spaces and brackets (regression)
test-case.name: Invoke-ArmTool.properly quotes arguments containing spaces and brackets (regression)

test-case.description: returns None when no media loaded
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.returns None when no media loaded

test-case.description: returns AudioCD when media loaded but no filesystem
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.returns AudioCD when media loaded but no filesystem

test-case.description: returns Video when VIDEO_TS present
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.returns Video when VIDEO_TS present

test-case.description: returns Data when filesystem present without video markers
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.returns Data when filesystem present without video markers

test-case.description: returns Video when BDMV present
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.returns Video when BDMV present

test-case.description: accepts lowercase drive letters and normalizes to uppercase
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.accepts lowercase drive letters and normalizes to uppercase

test-case.description: validates DriveLetter is single character
test-case.name: Get-DiscType.validates DriveLetter is single character

test-case.description: rips, resolves title, renames staging dir, moves to NAS, and notifies success
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.rips, resolves title, renames staging dir, moves to NAS, and notifies success

test-case.description: queues an upscale job when DVD and UpscaleDvds is true
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.queues an upscale job when DVD and UpscaleDvds is true

test-case.description: does not queue an upscale job for BD discs even when UpscaleDvds is true
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.does not queue an upscale job for BD discs even when UpscaleDvds is true

test-case.description: sends a dedicated MAKEMKV_KEY_EXPIRED notification and keeps staging on key expiry
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.sends a dedicated MAKEMKV_KEY_EXPIRED notification and keeps staging on key expiry

test-case.description: notifies Error and keeps staging on generic rip failure
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.notifies Error and keeps staging on generic rip failure

test-case.description: notifies Error and keeps staging when Move-ToNas fails
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Video disc.notifies Error and keeps staging when Move-ToNas fails

test-case.description: rips, moves to NAS, ejects, and notifies success
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Audio CD.rips, moves to NAS, ejects, and notifies success

test-case.description: notifies Error and keeps staging on rip failure
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Audio CD.notifies Error and keeps staging on rip failure

test-case.description: logs WARN and notifies Info without touching Move-ToNas or eject
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Data disc.logs WARN and notifies Info without touching Move-ToNas or eject

test-case.description: takes no action
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.None.takes no action

test-case.description: catches exceptions, logs Error, and notifies Error rather than propagating
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscDispatch.Unhandled dispatch error.catches exceptions, logs Error, and notifies Error rather than propagating

test-case.description: skips dispatch when the named mutex is already held (by another runspace)
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscMutexDispatch (single-flight).skips dispatch when the named mutex is already held (by another runspace)

test-case.description: dispatches and releases the mutex when free
test-case.name: Invoke-DiscMutexDispatch (single-flight).dispatches and releases the mutex when free

test-case.description: reads WRM_SIM_DISC when Config.Simulate is true
test-case.name: Resolve-CurrentDisc.reads WRM_SIM_DISC when Config.Simulate is true

test-case.description: defaults to None when WRM_SIM_DISC is unset in simulate mode
test-case.name: Resolve-CurrentDisc.defaults to None when WRM_SIM_DISC is unset in simulate mode

test-case.description: sanitizes invalid filename characters from the folder name
test-case.name: New-UpscaleQueueEntry.sanitizes invalid filename characters from the folder name

test-case.description: produces a named folder containing .mkv files under the temp NAS video root
test-case.name: End-to-end: DiscWatcher.ps1 -Simulate -Once (Video).produces a named folder containing .mkv files under the temp NAS video root

test-case.description: produces .flac files under the temp NAS music root
test-case.name: End-to-end: DiscWatcher.ps1 -Simulate -Once (AudioCD).produces .flac files under the temp NAS music root

test-case.description: consumes the queue file and produces the sample upscale output at its exact expected path
test-case.name: End-to-end: Upscale-Worker.ps1 -Simulate -Once.consumes the queue file and produces the sample upscale output at its exact expected path

test-case.description: successfully moves files and deletes source when verification passes
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.successfully moves files and deletes source when verification passes

test-case.description: preserves source when robocopy fails with exit code >= 8
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.preserves source when robocopy fails with exit code >= 8

test-case.description: preserves source when verification fails (file size mismatch)
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.preserves source when verification fails (file size mismatch)

test-case.description: preserves source when destination file is missing
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.preserves source when destination file is missing

test-case.description: returns error when source directory does not exist
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.returns error when source directory does not exist

test-case.description: never throws when robocopy raises an error
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.never throws when robocopy raises an error

test-case.description: accepts robocopy exit codes 0-7 as success
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.accepts robocopy exit codes 0-7 as success

test-case.description: creates subdirectory under DestRoot with SourceDir name
test-case.name: Move-ToNas.creates subdirectory under DestRoot with SourceDir name

test-case.description: replaces underscores and dots with spaces
test-case.name: Get-ArmCleanDiscLabel.replaces underscores and dots with spaces

test-case.description: strips DISC/DISK/D + number tokens

test-case.description: strips SEASON N tokens
test-case.name: Get-ArmCleanDiscLabel.strips SEASON N tokens

test-case.description: strips edition/region/format noise tokens
test-case.name: Get-ArmCleanDiscLabel.strips edition/region/format noise tokens

test-case.description: collapses whitespace and trims
test-case.name: Get-ArmCleanDiscLabel.collapses whitespace and trims

test-case.description: title-cases a cleaned label
test-case.name: ConvertTo-ArmTitleCase.title-cases a cleaned label

test-case.description: accepts a single result
test-case.name: Test-ArmTmdbAcceptance.accepts a single result

test-case.description: accepts when top popularity is at least 2x the runner-up
test-case.name: Test-ArmTmdbAcceptance.accepts when top popularity is at least 2x the runner-up

test-case.description: rejects when top popularity is less than 2x the runner-up
test-case.name: Test-ArmTmdbAcceptance.rejects when top popularity is less than 2x the runner-up

test-case.description: rejects an empty result set
test-case.name: Test-ArmTmdbAcceptance.rejects an empty result set

test-case.description: falls back to label+date naming when no TMDb API key is configured
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.falls back to label+date naming when no TMDb API key is configured

test-case.description: matches and returns "Title (Year)" when TMDb has one clear winner
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.matches and returns "Title (Year)" when TMDb has one clear winner

test-case.description: falls back when TMDb results are ambiguous (no clear popularity winner)
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.falls back when TMDb results are ambiguous (no clear popularity winner)

test-case.description: falls back when TMDb returns no results
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.falls back when TMDb returns no results

test-case.description: falls back when the TMDb HTTP call throws (offline/error)
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.falls back when the TMDb HTTP call throws (offline/error)

test-case.description: strips invalid filename characters from the matched folder name
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.strips invalid filename characters from the matched folder name

test-case.description: never throws
test-case.name: Resolve-Title.never throws

test-case.description: returns success with extracted artist and album

test-case.description: returns fallback values when no album directory found

test-case.description: returns fallback when directory name does not match pattern
test-case.name: Invoke-AudioRip.returns fallback when directory name does not match pattern

test-case.description: never throws an exception

test-case.description: creates staging directory with GUID

test-case.description: handles missing Config gracefully

test-case.description: passes correct arguments to Invoke-ArmTool

test-case.description: returns $null for non-matching lines

test-case.description: returns 0 for empty
test-case.name: ConvertTo-MakeMkvSeconds.returns 0 for empty

test-case.description: maps drive letter D to disc index 0 with label and BD type

test-case.description: rips successfully and returns disc metadata + title count

test-case.description: creates the output directory before ripping (real makemkvcon requires it to exist)

test-case.description: selects only the longest title when RipAllTitles is $false
test-case.name: Invoke-VideoRip.selects only the longest title when RipAllTitles is $false

test-case.description: falls back to title 0 when the disc-specific info call fails
test-case.name: Invoke-VideoRip.falls back to title 0 when the disc-specific info call fails

test-case.description: returns MAKEMKV_KEY_EXPIRED when the key has expired

test-case.description: fails gracefully when no disc is present in the requested drive

test-case.description: fails gracefully when makemkvcon info exits non-zero
test-case.name: Invoke-VideoRip.fails gracefully when makemkvcon info exits non-zero

test-case.description: fails gracefully when the rip produces no mkv files
test-case.name: Invoke-VideoRip.fails gracefully when the rip produces no mkv files

test-case.description: never throws even when Invoke-ArmTool itself throws
test-case.name: Invoke-VideoRip.never throws even when Invoke-ArmTool itself throws

test-case.description: produces real mkv files through stub-makemkvcon.ps1

test-case.description: returns true when winget list finds the id and exits 0

test-case.description: returns false when winget list does not find the id

test-case.description: returns false when winget exits non-zero
test-case.name: Test-WingetPackageInstalled.returns false when winget exits non-zero

test-case.description: skips installation when already installed
test-case.name: Install-WingetPackage.skips installation when already installed

test-case.description: invokes winget install when not already installed

test-case.description: creates missing directories and leaves existing ones alone
test-case.name: Initialize-ArmDirectories.creates missing directories and leaves existing ones alone

test-case.description: is idempotent when run twice

test-case.description: copies the example verbatim with -NonInteractive
test-case.name: New-ArmConfigFile.copies the example verbatim with -NonInteractive

test-case.description: substitutes supplied values without prompting when all params are given

test-case.description: accepts explicit blank TmdbApiKey/HaWebhookUrl without prompting
test-case.name: New-ArmConfigFile.accepts explicit blank TmdbApiKey/HaWebhookUrl without prompting

test-case.description: skips registration when the task already exists

test-case.description: registers a hidden at-logon task when absent

test-case.description: unregisters an existing task

test-case.description: no-ops unregistering a task that does not exist
test-case.name: Register-ArmScheduledTask / Unregister-ArmScheduledTask.no-ops unregistering a task that does not exist

test-case.description: classifies progressive source as Progressive
test-case.name: Get-InterlaceType.classifies progressive source as Progressive

test-case.description: classifies interlaced source as Interlaced
test-case.name: Get-InterlaceType.classifies interlaced source as Interlaced

test-case.description: classifies telecined source as Telecined
test-case.name: Get-InterlaceType.classifies telecined source as Telecined

test-case.description: defaults to Interlaced when idet output is unparseable
test-case.name: Get-InterlaceType.defaults to Interlaced when idet output is unparseable

test-case.description: calls Invoke-ArmTool with the ffmpeg idet filter and 2000 frame limit
test-case.name: Get-InterlaceType.calls Invoke-ArmTool with the ffmpeg idet filter and 2000 frame limit

test-case.description: returns Success with the expected output file name and interlace type
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.returns Success with the expected output file name and interlace type

test-case.description: uses the telecined filter chain when source is telecined
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.uses the telecined filter chain when source is telecined

test-case.description: passes -ss 600 -t 120 to the preprocess step when -SampleOnly is set
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.passes -ss 600 -t 120 to the preprocess step when -SampleOnly is set

test-case.description: returns Success=$false and Error when the video2x step fails
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.returns Success=$false and Error when the video2x step fails

test-case.description: never throws even when Invoke-ArmTool throws
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.never throws even when Invoke-ArmTool throws

test-case.description: cleans up temp files after a successful run
test-case.name: Invoke-Upscale.cleans up temp files after a successful run

test-case.description: returns true when window spans midnight and now is late night
test-case.name: Test-ArmActiveWindow.returns true when window spans midnight and now is late night

test-case.description: returns true when window spans midnight and now is early morning
test-case.name: Test-ArmActiveWindow.returns true when window spans midnight and now is early morning

test-case.description: returns false when window spans midnight and now is midday
test-case.name: Test-ArmActiveWindow.returns false when window spans midnight and now is midday

test-case.description: returns true when window does not span midnight and now is inside it
test-case.name: Test-ArmActiveWindow.returns true when window does not span midnight and now is inside it

test-case.description: returns true when no window is configured
test-case.name: Test-ArmActiveWindow.returns true when no window is configured

test-case.description: sample-review path: runs SampleOnly, notifies, and renames queue file to .awaiting-review
test-case.name: Start-UpscaleWorker -Once.sample-review path: runs SampleOnly, notifies, and renames queue file to .awaiting-review

test-case.description: auto-upscale path: runs full upscale, moves result to DestDir, notifies, deletes queue file
test-case.name: Start-UpscaleWorker -Once.auto-upscale path: runs full upscale, moves result to DestDir, notifies, deletes queue file

test-case.description: failure path: renames queue file to .failed and sends Error notification
test-case.name: Start-UpscaleWorker -Once.failure path: renames queue file to .failed and sends Error notification

test-case.description: does not process the queue outside active hours unless -Once is passed
test-case.name: Start-UpscaleWorker -Once.does not process the queue outside active hours unless -Once is passed
